High confidence due to distinct isolated flower shaped pair; weight conservatively estimated as small earrings; purity likely 22K; valuation includes typical making charges

assumptions: Gold rate used is 12435 INR per gram for 22K gold as provided (23 March 2026, Goodreturns).
Making charges estimated conservatively at 10% to 15% of gold value included in value ranges.
Purity not directly visible but typical traditional Indian jewellery purity estimated conservatively as 22K.
Weight estimates are conservative bounds based on typical weights and partial occlusion.
Stones and ornamentation volume included reducing effective gold mass but not separated out explicitly.
Items counted individually as per visible grouping, no item merging.
Value ranges calculated by multiplying weight bounds by 22K gold rate plus making charges.
